domain_experience: adjacent familiarity with local HVAC service business operations
assets: ability to build software and automations
family access to a local HVAC service owner
distribution: potential warm introductions to HVAC owners through brother
network_access: brother can introduce user to local HVAC service owners
constraints: warm introductions are not yet proven repeatable distribution
cannot assume former employer data or relationships are reusable
credibility_signals: 8 years of HVAC distribution ops experience
technical ability to build custom software and automations
unfair_advantages: combination of HVAC operational context and hands-on technical building ability
family-based path to early owner conversations

usable_edge: ability to ship software and automations without external developers
warm path to initial owner interviews and pilots through brother
restricted_or_unusable_edge: any confidential knowledge, pricing, customer data, or internal processes from prior distribution employers
brother's business goodwill beyond the introductions he is personally willing to make
fake_or_overstated_edge: brother-led introductions counted as durable distribution
domain experience alone counted as moat
technical skill alone counted as go-to-market advantage
weak_spots: no owned audience or inbound demand channel
buyer access quality is unproven beyond family introductions
unclear best initial buyer and workflow wedge
unclear whether the intended model is service, productized service, or SaaS
follow_up_questions: How many owner introductions are realistically available in the near term?
What type and size of HVAC businesses are in that network?
Which relationships from the user's past are personally owned and legally usable?
Which HVAC workflows does the user understand deeply enough to improve immediately?
Does the user prefer a service-led wedge or a product-first wedge?
confidence_notes: high: HVAC distribution operations experience is directly stated
high: ability to build software and automations is directly stated
medium: owner access exists through brother, but scale and buyer quality are not yet known
medium: HVAC service workflow familiarity is implied through family adjacency, not directly evidenced in detail
low: exact monetizable wedge is still unclear without follow-up
